---
title: "Roadmap"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Roadmap}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

```{r child = "../../ROADMAP.md"}
```
